name: Saatva Classic Mattress
introText: The Saatva Classic is a luxury innerspring hybrid with a 365-night trial, lifetime warranty, and white-glove delivery — the gold standard for luxury mattresses available in Canada.

specs.Firmness: Plush Soft / Luxury Firm / Firm (your choice)

whatWorks: Dual coil construction delivers exceptional edge support — the perimeter coil system provides the strongest edge support in this review, making the entire mattress surface usable.
365-night trial and lifetime warranty are unmatched in the industry — Saatva's willingness to exchange or replace over a full year removes all purchase risk.
worthKnowing: Priced in USD — Canadians pay exchange rate premium; $1,595 USD translates to ~$2,200+ CAD at current rates.
White-glove delivery is included — Saatva sets up the mattress in your room and removes the old one, which is a significant value-add that competitors charge extra for.

commonComplaints.title: USD pricing is a sting for Canadians
commonComplaints.body: Saatva prices in USD — Canadians pay currency exchange on top of the base price, making it more expensive than it appears.

commonComplaints.title: Less motion isolation than foam alternatives
commonComplaints.body: The coil system transmits movement more than foam or hybrid designs — light sleepers with active partners may prefer a foam mattress.

commonComplaints.title: Heavier and harder to move
commonComplaints.body: At 35cm height and dual coil construction, the Saatva Classic is one of the heaviest mattresses — rotating or moving requires professional help.

verdict: The Saatva Classic is the best luxury mattress for Canadians who want a hotel-quality sleep surface with the best trial and warranty in the industry. The USD pricing premium is real — budget accordingly. If you want Canadian company with simpler logistics, the Endy Hybrid is the better value.

realBuyers.quote: Slept on hundreds of hotel mattresses. This is the closest I've found to a 5-star hotel bed at home.
365-night trial removed all hesitation. Kept it — it's the best mattress we've owned.
White glove delivery was fantastic — set up in the room, old mattress hauled away. Worth the price alone.

metaDescription: Saatva Classic Mattress review: luxury innerspring hybrid, 365-night trial, lifetime warranty. ~$1,595 USD (Queen). Best luxury mattress available in Canada.
